title: procMessenger :: Client Control
description:
procMessenger 2026
    Home Network Device-to-Device Messaging System
       With direct control from a mobile app on your phone
     Languages - Python, Java, JavaScript, nodejs
    
      procMessenger is a Work-in-Progress! 
    
      Server + Client Network Messaging to perform taks;
       Allowing mobile app controlled clients on the network  
         Using a custom Protocol for WebSocket connected Clients 

      Local-LLM or API-Key LLM AI Integration
       With allowed access to Whitelisted functions,
         Chat, Research, & Automation

    
     
  
    

      So, ya know how OpenClaw is this AI system that takes over your computer and deletes emails and reads private-keys and leaks them to the internet?
         Yeah, lets not do that.

media.caption: Connect to Client scripts & programs from your Phone; Run scripts, such as the mobile app apk build script Then download the build through the file browser in the mobile app!
Gather Research refined and reviewed by Local-network LLM Then have a conversation about the results, including its own take on the info.
Access a non-linear story builder BranchShredder Write stories or build networks of ideas and concepts in a graph view! All controllable from your phone
